scripts.test: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require playwright/steps/**/*.ts playwright/features/**/*.feature --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html
scripts.test:smoke: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require playwright/steps/**/*.ts playwright/features/**/*.feature --tags "@smoke" --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html
scripts.test:single: cucumber-js playwright/features/promocode.feature --require-module ts-node/register --require playwright/steps/**/*.ts --format progress --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html
